# My Agent Logs

> Notes on AI agents, MCP servers, skills, and instructions.

## Registries

- [MCP servers](/tags/mcp.json): Structured JSON — install commands, tool lists, config blocks
- [Skills](/tags/skill.json): Structured JSON — skill names, descriptions, full skill body

## Posts

{% for post in site.posts %}- [{{ post.title }}](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/pjosols/myagentlogs/main/_posts/{{ post.path | split: '/' | last }}): {{ post.description }}
{% endfor %}
